Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

mock is preferred way.
This way don't provide an ability to satisfy build dependes automatically.

Patch Set 4:

I don't force anyone to use docker/podman. docker/podman is a very trivial way to have number of building environments.

Patch Set 4:

Alexey, you're free to suggest your way and have it in contrib/ so people can choose which way works better for them in their cases.

commit.subject: LU-14189 contrib: docker example to build Lustre
commit.message:
LU-14189 contrib: docker example to build Lustre

can be easily modified for any target like specific RHEL, CentOS, etc

Test-Parameters: trivial
